channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-06-26 to 2026-07-02
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 4 INTERESTING, 3 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Fri 2026-06-26: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.0 ft @ 5.0 sec, wind 2 kt E, water 63°F. Low tide: 11:12. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.0 ft); period too short (5.0 sec); wind direction off (E). Sat 2026-06-27: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 07:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 0 kt W, water 64°F. Low tide: 00:03, 11:55. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sun 2026-06-28: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 4 kt WNW, water 65°F. Low tide: 00:48, 12:39. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Mon 2026-06-29: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 7.1 sec, wind 3 kt WNW, water 66°F. Low tide: 01:32, 13:24. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Tue 2026-06-30: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.6 ft @ 7.3 sec, wind 5 kt SW, water 68°F. Low tide: 02:15, 14:07. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Wed 2026-07-01: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.6 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 10 kt WSW, water 67°F. Low tide: 02:55, 14:49. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.6 ft); period too short (5.5 sec). Thu 2026-07-02: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.7 ft @ 5.8 sec, wind 4 kt SE, water 63°F. Low tide: 03:32, 15:27. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.7 ft); period too short (5.8 sec); wind direction off (SE).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 4 INTERESTING, 3 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Fri 2026-06-26: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.0 ft @ 5.0 sec, wind 2 kt E, water 63°F. Low tide: 11:12. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.0 ft); period too short (5.0 sec); wind direction off (E).
  • Sat 2026-06-27: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 07:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 0 kt W, water 64°F. Low tide: 00:03, 11:55. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sun 2026-06-28: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 4 kt WNW, water 65°F. Low tide: 00:48, 12:39. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Mon 2026-06-29: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 7.1 sec, wind 3 kt WNW, water 66°F. Low tide: 01:32, 13:24. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Tue 2026-06-30: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.6 ft @ 7.3 sec, wind 5 kt SW, water 68°F. Low tide: 02:15, 14:07. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Wed 2026-07-01: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.6 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 10 kt WSW, water 67°F. Low tide: 02:55, 14:49. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.6 ft); period too short (5.5 sec).
  • Thu 2026-07-02: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.7 ft @ 5.8 sec, wind 4 kt SE, water 63°F. Low tide: 03:32, 15:27. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.7 ft); period too short (5.8 sec); wind direction off (SE).
